faqs.title: FAQs
faqs.question1: At what stage is the KYC verification required?
faqs.answer1: KYC verification is required when you request your first payout. You'll need to provide valid identification documents and proof of address to complete the verification process. This is a one-time requirement to ensure compliance with financial regulations.
faqs.answer2:
Anyone aged 18 or older is welcome to join ThaurusGuru, as long as they are not located in a restricted country.
We currently do not accept applications from residents of jurisdictions under international sanctions or local regulatory restrictions.
faqs.question3: Why should i join Thaurus Guru?
faqs.answer3: Thaurus Guru offers professional trading opportunities with institutional-grade tools, transparent profit sharing, and flexible account sizes. You'll benefit from our comprehensive support system, advanced analytics, and a thriving community of traders worldwide.
faqs.question4: Is Thaurus Guru a trustworthy company?
faqs.answer4: Yes, Thaurus Guru is built on transparency and professionalism. We provide regular payouts, maintain clear trading rules, and offer full support to our traders. Our track record and community testimonials demonstrate our commitment to trader success.

footer.disclaimerText: Thaurusguru is a trading education and evaluation company that does not in any way collect customer deposits or offer any financial services to customers. Thaurusguru only provides services of simulated trading and educational tools for traders. All trading accounts provided to customers are part of a virtual demo environment using purely virtual money. The information on this site is not directed at residents in any country or jurisdiction where such distribution or use would be contrary to local laws or regulations. All information on this website is solely for educational purposes related to trading on financial markets. Any opinions, news, research, analysis, prices, or other information contained on this website is provided as general market commentary and does not constitute any investment advice. Thaurusguru does not provide any investment recommendation, business recommendation, investment opportunity analysis or similar general recommendation regarding the trading of investment instruments. The offered technical solution for the Thaurusguru platforms and data feed is powered by Thaurus Ltd, a licensed investment broker. Certain restrictions for access to services shall apply to Customers being residents or nationals of the United States of America, North Korea, Iran, Russia and others, depending on the actual list of acceptable jurisdictions. Please check the updated list.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Learn more about Thaurus Guru
aboutUs.heroDescription: A powerful strategy shouldn't be held back by a small balance. ThaurusGuru exists to solve the capital problem. We provide the professional virtual funding and the high-performance environment to unlock the true potential of your strategy. You focus on the charts; we provide the volume to make every trade count.
aboutUs.whoWeAreDesc: Launched on October 17, 2024, and Broker Backed by Thaurus LTD, we are a dream team of 25+ people striving to make the world of prop trading better. We offer a seamless simulation environment where your results dictate your growth, backed by 24/7 human support.
aboutUs.ourVisionPoint1: A Standard of Integrity: To establish a transparent ecosystem where trading discipline is the only metric for success.
aboutUs.ourVisionPoint2: Universal Accessibility: To ensure that professional capital is accessible to skilled traders, removing financial background as a barrier to entry.
aboutUs.ourVisionPoint3: Sustainable Careers: To build a stable environment that prioritizes long-term professional growth over short-term speculation.
aboutUs.ourMissionPoint1: Bridging the Market Gap: To deliver the essential elements often missing in the industry: accountability, reliability, and clear terms.
aboutUs.ourMissionPoint2: Operational Efficiency: To provide affordable challenges and rapid payouts, ensuring a seamless professional experience for every partner.
aboutUs.ourMissionPoint3: Unwavering Support: To maintain 24/7 service, ensuring that expert assistance is always available whenever the markets are open.
aboutUs.ourMissionPoint4: Dedicated Expertise: To foster a strong community backed by a team of 25+ professionals committed to elevating the standards of proprietary trading.
aboutUs.whyChooseDesc: Built on the pillars of accessibility, speed, and professional reliability. We provide the infrastructure; you provide the edge.
aboutUs.accessibleOpportunitiesDesc: We believe that professional capital should be earned, not bought. Start your journey with our affordable challenges, designed to reward skill over financial background. Our tiered structure allows for traders to enter the market and scale.
aboutUs.rapidPayoutsDesc: Your performance deserves immediate reward. We prioritize fast, transparent payouts, ensuring that your hard-earned profits are delivered to you without unnecessary delays.
aboutUs.supportAndMentorshipDesc: Trade with confidence at a reliable environment directly backed by Thaurus LTD. Combine with our 24/7 support team, we're here to help you operate but ultimately dictate the clock.
